theory.canonical_statement: ID5617 records Modulate Properties Example Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\main.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ to modulate properties. Example: \begin{equation} \mu(\bm{x})=\mu_{\rm base}\Bigl[1+\varepsilon_\mu\,G(r,\theta,\phi)\Bigr], \end{equation} \begin{equation} \bm{M}(\bm{x})=M_0\,h(G)\,\hat{\bm{t}}_{\rm spiral}(\theta,\phi;\hat{\bm{n}}(t)), \end{equation} where $
